title: White Trash Candy
instructions:
Mix all the crunchy ingredients in a large bowl. Separate the mixture into 2 equal portions.
Melt one bag of chocolate until smooth in the microwave. Pour over one portion and stir to coat the cereal evenly. Spread onto a piece of wax paper in a 1” layer. Repeat the process with the second batch.
After about 10 minutes break the layer into bite sized pieces and serve.
